projectDescription: A multi-tenant SaaS platform for dental clinics, providing patient management, appointment scheduling, odontogram tracking, and subscription-based plan management via Stripe.
keyFeatures: Multi-tenant dental clinic management with per-clinic data isolation
Patient records with medical history, allergies, blood type, and emergency contacts
Appointment scheduling with real-time doctor availability and slot management
Interactive odontogram for tracking dental conditions per tooth
Treatment and clinical evolution tracking with photo progress uploads
Cash register and income tracking with payment recording
SaaS subscription plans (Basic, Premium, Ultra) with Stripe integration
Premium plan gating (e.g., advertising module requires Premium+)
Global admin panel for monitoring all clinics, subscriptions, and MRR
Role-based access control (administrator, doctor, receptionist, patient)
publicApiSurface: GET /api/calendario/horas-ocupadas — Occupied time slots for a date
POST /stripe/webhook — Stripe webhook for subscription sync
